'''Drexel II''', also called the "'''water world of Drexel II'''," lacked a proper name. It was an [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]]-covered [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="Gamer6">{{GamerCite|6|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Nikto}}</ref> The [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Inleshat/Legends|Inleshat]] [[Species/Legends|species]] were once indigeonous to the planet.<ref name="Gamer1" />

==History==
[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] aided the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] on Drexel II during the period of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="TNEGTC">''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref>

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]], a group of [[Gluss'sa'Nikto]] established a colony on Drexel II.<ref name="Gamer6" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Drexel II" was an invention by [[Rich Handley]] and [[Joseph Bongiorno|Joe Bongiorno]] for their article ''[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series]]'' published in [[2000]]'s ''[[Star Wars Gamer 1]]''.<ref name="Gamer1" />
[[Jason Fry]] confirmed that the [[Drexel Minor system/Legends|Drexel Minor system]] was created because the original [[Drexel system/Legends|Drexel system]] from [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel Star Wars]] had only one planet, [[Drexel/Legends|Drexel]], and couldn't also contain the Drexel II mentioned in later sources.<ref name="Atlas">{{JCFCite|url=posts/30387023|board=Literature|thread=The Essential Atlas and Galactic Cartography: Official Discussion|user=[[Jason Fry|jasonfry]]|date=2009-08-28|time=11:05 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20180225165344/http://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-essential-atlas-and-galactic-cartography-official-discussion.21938930/page-109}}</ref>
